name: verify currency on backend subscription

condition.statement:
let checklogs = "{{checklogs}}"
let freeTrial = "{{freeTrial}}"
return checklogs != "upgrade" && freeTrial != "yes" && "{{includeTax}}" === "no"

steps.value:
let result = {{listPrices}}
return Intl.NumberFormat('{{defaultLocale}}', { style: 'currency', currency: '{{currency}}'}).format(result[6])

let test = "{{test}}"

blueSnapVs = blueSnapVs.split('.');
return ("{{includeTax}}" === "yes"
&& (Number(blueSnapVs[0]) >= 3 && Number(blueSnapVs[1]) >= 2)) 
|| "{{includeTax}}" === "no"
